Pack: werewolf / social_deduction. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a mountain pass village where the dawn narration sets the tone. The elder narrator reveals who vanished overnight with grave, measured delivery. GameSpec summary: title=La Dernière Aube du Col Blanc, theme=col de montagne glacé, mechanics=hidden_roles,turn_phases,voting,elimination,team_victory,ai_personas, phases=night,dawn,discussion,vote, roles=werewolf,seer,hunter,villager,elder_narrator.

Pack: werewolf / social_deduction. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a dramatic accusation scene where one villager builds a multi-night case. She presents observations from three consecutive nights, methodically eliminating suspects until one remains. The tone is cold, logical, and devastating. GameSpec summary: title=La Preuve des Trois Nuits, theme=tribunal de village improvisé, mechanics=hidden_roles,turn_phases,voting,elimination,team_victory,ai_personas, phases=night,dawn,evidence_presentation,cross_examination,vote, roles=werewolf,seer,accuser,accused,villager.
